properties.name: MIG Welder
properties.notes: Most common fault: wire feed motor overload

properties.alarm_message: Wire feed motor overload — feed rate dropped below minimum
properties.frequency_trigger: 3 or more alarms in one shift indicates systemic fault
properties.wrong_response: Do not keep adjusting tension — will not fix worn drive rolls
properties.correct_response: Stop production. Inspect drive rolls and liner.
properties.escalation: Call maintenance if cannot be cleared by tension adjustment

properties.alarm_message: Arc instability detected — voltage fluctuating outside tolerance
properties.normal_range: Voltage stable within plus or minus 1V during welding
properties.quality_impact: Parts welded during arc instability must be flagged for QC inspection
properties.escalation: Call maintenance if persists after earth clamp and contact tip replacement

properties.alarm_message: Contact tip temperature high — possible tip wear or blockage
properties.cooling_required: Allow 10 minutes cooling before touching tip

properties.alarm_message: Shielding gas pressure low — check cylinder and regulator
properties.criticality: CRITICAL — never weld without shielding gas
properties.quality_impact: All parts welded after alarm must be scrapped regardless of visual appearance

properties.wear_indicator: Groove worn from 0.8mm to 1.1mm measured width
properties.wear_effect: Wire sits lower in groove, reducing grip, causing inconsistent feed speed
properties.ncr_reference: NCR-2024-047 — drive rolls 127 hours beyond service interval

properties.symptom: Uneven resistance on manual wire pull test
properties.common_failure_point: Torch neck bend — debris accumulates here
properties.check_method: Disconnect torch, blow through liner with compressed air

properties.effect: Causes arc instability and voltage fluctuation alarms
properties.fix: Clean contact surfaces with wire brush and re-secure

properties.wear_indicator: Oval bore instead of circular bore
properties.spatter_blockage: Reduces gas flow and cooling — causes tip temperature high
properties.torque_spec: Hand tight plus quarter turn — do not over-torque
properties.replace_with: Replace at same time as liner and drive roll service

properties.effect: Increases resistance on wire feed, contributing to motor overload

properties.check_method: Inspect hose connections with soapy water if pressure dropping
properties.fix: Check regulator and all hose connections

properties.correct_spec: 10 to 15mm from contact tip to workpiece
properties.effect_if_wrong: Causes contact tip temperature to rise above alarm threshold

properties.trigger_conditions: 3+ overload alarms in one shift, uneven liner resistance, worn drive roll groove, inconsistent feed despite correct tension
properties.safety_required: LOTO — isolate power at main disconnect before starting
properties.signoff_required: Supervisor sign-off before returning machine to production

properties.mandatory: true — do not skip after liner replacement
properties.method: Run wire at 5.0 m/min for 30 seconds before welding
properties.purpose: Seats wire in new liner and clears manufacturing debris
properties.important_note: Wire feed instability in first 5 minutes after liner replacement is EXPECTED BEHAVIOUR — not a fault condition

properties.torque: Hand tight plus quarter turn — do not over-torque
properties.replace_when: Bore is oval, tip temp alarm occurs, during any liner or drive roll service
properties.cooling_first: Allow 10 minutes cooling before touching if tip temp alarm fired

properties.method: Clean contact surfaces, re-secure to clean bare metal

properties.required_before: Any maintenance, liner replacement, drive roll replacement
properties.steps: Isolate power at main disconnect. Lock with personal padlock. Tag with name and date. Test machine cannot be enabled.
properties.rule: Do not attempt electrical repairs — always call maintenance

properties.hearing: Hearing protection when HC-401 press is running nearby

properties.triggered_by: Arc instability event, shielding gas low alarm, wire feed fault
properties.action: Quarantine parts welded during fault event — do not pass without inspection

properties.trigger_1: Same alarm type 3 or more times in one shift
properties.trigger_2: Wire feed overload cannot be cleared by tension adjustment
properties.trigger_3: Arc instability persists after earth clamp and contact tip replacement
properties.trigger_4: Any electrical fault codes on power source display
properties.trigger_5: Torch lead damaged, kinked, or showing coolant leak
properties.trigger_6: Power source fails to enable or trips on startup

properties.below_minimum: Below 4.5 m/min — cold weld, burn-back risk

properties.correct_setting: Finger-tight plus one quarter turn on pressure arm

properties.description: Operator increases tension to compensate for worn drive rolls, causing motor overload, leading to birdnesting
properties.chain: Worn groove reduces grip → inconsistent feed → operator tightens → overload → birdnesting → 35 min downtime
properties.correct_response: Stop production. Inspect drive rolls. Do not adjust tension further.

properties.trigger: 3 or more wire feed motor overload alarms in one shift
properties.meaning: Worn drive rolls, damaged liner, or failing motor — NOT operator error
properties.correct_response: Stop production and conduct full drive roll and liner inspection
properties.risk_of_wrong_response: Motor burnout, weld quality defects, arc instability, birdnesting

properties.covers: Operating procedure, parameter settings, alarm response, shutdown
Wire liner and drive roll replacement procedure

properties.incident: 3 wire feed motor overload alarms night shift 13 November 2024
properties.root_cause: Drive rolls 127 hours beyond 500-hour service interval

properties.note: tension too tight or too loose

properties.condition: 3 or more alarms in one shift

properties.note: wire feed inconsistency causes arc instability
parts welded during arc instability must be inspected
wire feed fault can cause secondary arc instability
all parts welded after alarm must be scrapped
operator tightens tension to compensate — wrong response

properties.warning: do not skip — wire instability after replacement is expected not a fault

properties.note: replace contact tip at same time
corrective action taken after November 2024 incident
